generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that strengthening our strategic autonomy actually makes us safer? By reducing reliance on foreign suppliers, we protect our critical infrastructure from geopolitical shocks. It's not just about being self-sufficient—it's about ensuring our national security in an uncertain world. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
